id.title: id
id.description: Only return resources that belong to this id.

ids.title: ids
ids.description: Defines the ids to query for.

projectId.title: project_id
projectId.description: ProjectID is the unique identifier of the project.

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: OrganizationID is the unique identifier of the organization the project belongs to.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: CreationDate is the timestamp of the project creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: ChangeDate is the timestamp of the last change to the project (e.g. creation, activation, deactivation).

name.title: name
name.description: Name is the name of the project. This might be presented to users, e.g. in sign-in flows.

state.title: state
state.description: State describes the current state of the project.

projectRoleAssertion.title: project_role_assertion
projectRoleAssertion.description: ProjectRoleAssertion is a boolean flag that describes if the roles of the user should be added to the token.

authorizationRequired.title: authorization_required
authorizationRequired.description:
AuthorizationRequired is a boolean flag that can be enabled to check if a user has
 an authorization to use this project assigned when login into an application of this project.

projectAccessRequired.title: project_access_required
projectAccessRequired.description:
ProjectAccessRequired is a boolean flag that can be enabled to check if the organization of the user,
 that is trying to log in, has access to this project (either owns the project or is granted).

privateLabelingSetting.title: private_labeling_setting
privateLabelingSetting.description: PrivateLabelingSetting defines from where the private labeling should be triggered.

grantedOrganizationId.title: granted_organization_id
grantedOrganizationId.description:
GrantedOrganizationID is the ID of the organization the project is granted to.
 In case the project is not granted, this field is unset.

grantedOrganizationName.title: granted_organization_name
grantedOrganizationName.description:
GrantedOrganizationName is the name of the organization the project is granted to.
 In case the project is not granted, this field is unset.

grantedState.title: granted_state
grantedState.description:
GrantedProjectState describes the current state of the granted project.
 In case the project is not granted, this field is set to GrantedProjectState.GRANTED_PROJECT_STATE_UNSPECIFIED.

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the organization which granted the project to the granted_organization_id.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the granted project creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the granted project (e.g. creation, activation, deactivation).

grantedOrganizationId.title: granted_organization_id
grantedOrganizationId.description: The ID of the organization the project is granted to.

grantedOrganizationName.title: granted_organization_name
grantedOrganizationName.description: The name of the organization the project is granted to.

grantedRoleKeys.title: granted_role_keys
grantedRoleKeys.description: The roles granted to the organization for self-management of the project.

projectId.title: project_id
projectId.description: The ID of the granted project.

projectName.title: project_name
projectName.description: The name of the granted project.

state.title: state
state.description: Describes the current state of the granted project.

grantedOrganizationIdFilter.title: granted_organization_id_filter
grantedOrganizationIdFilter.description: Filter for project grants that were granted to a specific organization.

inProjectIdsFilter.title: in_project_ids_filter
inProjectIdsFilter.description: Filter for project grants of a specific project ID.

organizationIdFilter.title: organization_id_filter
organizationIdFilter.description: Filter for project grants that were granted from a specific organization.

projectNameFilter.title: project_name_filter
projectNameFilter.description: Filter for project grants with a specific project name.

roleKeyFilter.title: role_key_filter
roleKeyFilter.description: Filter for project grants where a specific role is granted.

projectName.title: project_name
projectName.description: Defines the name of the project to query for.

method.title: method
method.description: Defines which text comparison method used for the name query.

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: OrganizationID Is the ID of the organization to query for.

type.title: type
type.description:
Defines whether to filter for owned, granted or both types of projects.
 If not specified, defaults to OWNED_OR_GRANTED and will return both owned and granted projects.

projectId.title: project_id
projectId.description: ProjectID is the ID of the project the role belongs to.

key.title: key
key.description:
Key of the project role. The key identifies the role. It's the only relevant attribute for Zitadel and
 will be used for authorization checks and as claim in tokens and user info responses.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: CreationDate is the timestamp of the project role creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: ChangeDate is the timestamp of the last change to the project role.

displayName.title: display_name
displayName.description: DisplayName is a human readable name for the role, which might be displayed to users.

group.title: group
group.description:
Group allows grouping roles for display purposes. Zitadel will not handle it in any way.
 It can be used to group roles in a UI to allow easier management for administrators.
 This attribute is not to be confused with groups as a collection of users.

displayName.title: display_name
displayName.description: The display name of the project role to query for.

method.title: method
method.description: Defines which text comparison method used for the name query.

key.title: key
key.description: The key of the project role to query for.

method.title: method
method.description: Defines which text comparison method used for the key query.

displayNameFilter.title: display_name_filter
displayNameFilter.description: Filter for project roles with a specific display name.

roleKeyFilter.title: role_key_filter
roleKeyFilter.description: Filter for project roles with a specific key.

inProjectIdsFilter.title: in_project_ids_filter
inProjectIdsFilter.description: Filter for projects with a specific ID.

organizationIdFilter.title: organization_id_filter
organizationIdFilter.description:
Filter for projects that are owned by or granted to a specific organization.
 You can specify whether to search for owned, granted or both types of projects.

projectNameFilter.title: project_name_filter
projectNameFilter.description: Filter for projects with a specific name.
